name: Your Protocol Name
default_model_role: YOUR_PRIMARY_MODEL — orchestrator and primary task execution

implementation.notes: Primary model for implementation tasks. Fallback used if primary fails.

review.notes: Independent model for review tasks. Should differ from implementation model when possible.

architecture.notes: Model for architecture and high-risk decisions.

exploration.notes: Cheaper model for read-only discovery and classification.

notes.api_keys: Configure API keys as environment variables. Never hardcode keys in this file.
notes.advisory: All routing is advisory. The protocol recommends models but does not enforce them at runtime.
notes.safety: Keep safety rules in AGENTS.md unchanged. Keep privacy scan patterns in public-surface-scan.sh unchanged.
